description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/finite-loop/flutils/pyenv:latest. Define a job called tests that runs in the default test stage, sets the PATH variable to "/opt/python/bin:/opt/poetry/bin:/opt/pyenv/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin", and then executes the command tox. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
